overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy walking through a vibrant autumn landscape. The journey transitions from a dense forest with red foliage through open grasslands with mechanical wreckage, ending along a rocky riverbank. The scene features cinematic lighting with golden hour sun breaking through clouds.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense autumn forest trail with red foliage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a winding dirt path through dense autumn forest with red and orange foliage

entered.detail: tall trees with dense red and orange autumn leaves forming a canopy overhead
narrow winding dirt trail with patches of snow or light-colored earth
mountain range visible through gaps in the trees under cloudy sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dense autumn forest with vibrant red and orange foliage. The character walks steadily along a narrow dirt path surrounded by tall trees that partially obscure the sky, with distant mountains visible through the canopy.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland with tall golden grass and scattered trees

events.description: encounter group of NPC warriors standing on the path ahead
large mechanical wreckage becomes visible on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking through open grassland, passing a group of NPCs and continuing past mechanical debris

notable_agents.action: group of tribal warriors standing on the path, watching as the character passes by

entered.detail: tall golden wheat-like grass covering the open fields on both sides of the path
large pile of black mechanical debris and wreckage from machines

segments.scene_description: The environment opens into wide grasslands with tall golden grass under direct sunlight. The character passes a group of standing NPC warriors around 18 seconds, then continues past large mechanical wreckage visible on the left side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky riverbank with flowing water and autumn trees

events.description: terrain transitions to rocky riverbank as the river comes into view on the left

agents.ego_description: walking along the rocky riverbank, navigating terrain with water visible to the left

entered.detail: flowing river with greenish water visible alongside the path
rocky terrain and dirt path along the edge of the water

segments.scene_description: The path descends to a rocky riverbank where a flowing river becomes visible on the left. The character continues walking along the water's edge, with autumn trees lining the bank and distant mountains visible through the haze.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense autumn forest that gradually opens into wide grasslands and ends along a rocky riverbank. It begins on a narrow dirt path surrounded by vibrant red and orange foliage, with tall trees partially obscuring the sky and distant mountains. As the forest thins, the scene expands into open grasslands of tall golden grass under direct sunlight, where the camera passes a group of warriors and large mechanical wreckage. The path then descends toward the water's edge, shifting the landscape to a rocky riverbank with a flowing river on the left. Finally, the journey continues along the bank lined with autumn trees, with the distant mountains remaining visible through a soft haze.
